programme.desc: A Florida couple with a newborn sues their California landlord, who aids homeless families, alleging overcrowding and financial mistreatment; the landlord countersues, accusing them of forgery and harassment.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: You Ripped Up His Birth Certificate?!?; Unlock: My Man Got Me & My Ex-BFF Pregnant
programme.desc: Dayrel says he's being shut out of his son's life, while Shanquelle says she's always been certain Dayrel is the father and that his doubts are the real issue; Lakaylyn was thrilled to be pregnant with her boyfriend Maurice's baby until she learned he got her best friend pregnant at the same time; Maurice says he stepped out because Lakaylyn was talking to another man.

programme.desc: A farmworker must defend against his ex-boss's claims that he owes for a phone, rent and a personal loan.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph Kramden is a perpetually flustered but eternally optimistic New York City bus driver living with his wife, Alice, in a small Brooklyn apartment. Ralph's best friend is sanitation worker Ed Norton, who lives in the same building with wife Trixie.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph Kramden is a perpetually flustered but eternally optimistic New York City bus driver living with his wife, Alice, in a small Brooklyn apartment. Ralph's best friend is sanitation worker Ed Norton, who lives in the same building with wife Trixie.
